---
applyTo: "**"
---

- iOS (16+) companion app and watchOS (10+) project.
- Shared Data exists between both targets, for global constants, error handling, shared models and general services and utils.
- The shared Schema.swift is auto-generated by Supabase, which is the only backend Providor that we use.
- Simplicity is key and so is well-working and robust code.
- Never write any code comments, nor ever be verbose unless asked.
